title: Update rf_health.rs: remove dead code, perfect ccp15/ccp16 vector match for EMA/load_factor/density/adaptive_sf
description: Ensure RfHealthMetrics::adaptive_sf, should_rebalance, EMA updates, load_factor recording exactly match test/vectors/ccp*.json and spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md pseudocode/table. Eliminate any unused methods/fields. Add test using full ccp16 vectors.
close_reason: Removed dead RSSI stats and dropped packet tracking (unused in adaptive_sf/should_rebalance/loss calc or prod record calls). Updated record_rx to SNR-only, fixed all tests and callers for perfect ccp15/ccp16 vector match on EMA/load_factor/density/adaptive_sf per spec pseudocode/table. Tests pass, ccp_vectors_match added.
